name: excel-com-mcp
description: Model Context Protocol server for Excel (.xlsx): openpyxl plus optional Windows COM. COM-first routing (auto/com) for reads and writes when Excel has the workbook open; file fallback or workbook_transport=file for on-disk snapshots. chart/pivot v1 file-forced (ADR 0004). Persistence: save_workbook only (no save_after_write). Discovery: excel_list_open_workbooks (COM; ADR 0009). Lifecycle: excel_open_workbook, excel_close_workbook (COM). filepath: absolute local path, OR (stdio, COM) same https FullName as Excel. M365 auth is via Excel. With EXCEL_MCP_ALLOWED_PATHS, https needs EXCEL_MCP_ALLOWED_URL_PREFIXES. Dev: uv run --project <repo> excel-com-mcp stdio. See README, TOOLS.md.

tools.name: create_workbook
tools.description: Create a new Excel workbook; optional open_in_excel for COM session

tools.name: excel_open_workbook
tools.description: Open existing workbook in Excel (COM; Windows) for COM-first routing

tools.name: excel_close_workbook
tools.description: Close workbook in Excel host; optional save before close

tools.name: excel_list_open_workbooks
tools.description: List workbooks open in Excel (JSON; COM); use full_name for metadata and reads (ADR 0009)

tools.name: save_workbook
tools.description: Save workbook to disk (explicit persist; use after mutations)

tools.name: create_worksheet
tools.description: Create a new worksheet in a workbook

tools.name: get_merged_cells
tools.description: Get list of merged cell ranges

tools.name: create_chart
tools.description: Create chart (line, bar, pie, scatter, etc.)

tools.name: copy_range
tools.description: Copy cell range to another location

tools.name: get_data_validation_info
tools.description: Get data validation rules for cell
